mapper.sql: select reading_id, node_id, soil_moisture_pct, air_temp_c, air_humidity_pct, light_lux, soil_temp_c, reading_time, create_time from agri_sensor_reading
mapper.select:
and node_id = #{nodeId}
order by reading_time desc

select avg(soil_moisture_pct) as avg_soil_moisture_pct, avg(air_temp_c) as avg_air_temp_c, avg(air_humidity_pct) as avg_air_humidity_pct, avg(light_lux) as avg_light_lux, avg(soil_temp_c) as avg_soil_temp_c from agri_sensor_reading where node_id = #{nodeId} and reading_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{hours} hour)
mapper.delete: delete from agri_sensor_reading where reading_id in #{id}
